thesis_summary: NVDA dominates AI accelerator market. Hyperscalers continue record AI infrastructure capex; data-center revenue still growing >50% YoY.
evidence: Microsoft, Meta, Google each raised 2026 capex guidance citing AI buildout
NVDA gross margins remain >70% on H200 / Blackwell shipments
notes: Obvious AI-capex case. Export controls included because China AI-chip restrictions materially change the addressable market.

thesis_summary: Long AAPL: services growth + buyback offset hardware deceleration. Largest single risk is China demand and supply concentration.
evidence: Foxconn Zhengzhou assembly produces majority of iPhones
notes: Antitrust included because of App Store / DOJ litigation pressure on services TAM.

thesis_summary: Energy major; thesis is sustained capital discipline + capex restraint into a structurally undersupplied oil market, with refining margins benefiting from low US natgas.
evidence: US shale productivity per rig flattening
notes: Permitting matters for Guyana / Permian expansion timelines.

thesis_summary: TSLA: EV demand sensitivity to IRA credits + China competition; thesis depends on continued EV tax-credit availability and robotaxi narrative.
evidence: IRA $7,500 EV credit at risk under policy reversal
BYD undercutting on price in EU + Asia
notes: tax_policy because IRA credits literally are tax policy.

thesis_summary: Large-cap bank: net interest income benefits from higher-for-longer rates; loan-loss provisions normalizing.
evidence: Capital markets fees recovering off cycle lows
notes: Basel III endgame still a meaningful overhang for capital ratios.

thesis_summary: Defense prime: backlog at record; supplemental aid + sustained defense topline benefit F-35 / missile programs.
evidence: Ukraine + Israel + Taiwan tensions sustaining demand

thesis_summary: Lilly: GLP-1 franchise (Mounjaro / Zepbound) with multi-year supply-constrained demand; pipeline catalyst from oral GLP-1.
evidence: CMS coverage debate ongoing for obesity drugs
notes: IRA negotiation list is an obvious risk; drug_pricing covers it.

thesis_summary: TSM monopoly on leading-edge logic. Thesis: AI demand for N3 / N2 sustains pricing power; Arizona fabs de-risk geopolitical concentration.
evidence: CHIPS Act award $11.6B for AZ fabs
notes: Classic semis case; multiple regime variables apply.

thesis_summary: Coinbase: regulatory clarity post-election (ETH/SOL ETFs, SAB-121 rescinded) drives institutional adoption + staking re-launch.
NextEra: leading renewables developer; thesis depends on continued IRA production tax credit + transmission permitting acceleration.
Walmart: scale advantages + grocery share gains; long-term consumer thesis with modest exposure to imported goods tariffs.
evidence: Roughly 1/3 of GM imports from China
notes: Labor policy borderline; included because minimum-wage + overtime rules matter at scale.

thesis_summary: META: Reels monetization + Reality Labs optionality + AI ad targeting. Antitrust + child-safety legislation are the main premise risks.
evidence: FTC case re Instagram + WhatsApp divestiture continuing
notes: ai_policy covers EU AI Act + emerging US ai-disclosure rules.

thesis_summary: Boeing: 737 Max ramp recovery + 787 deliveries; commercial cycle thesis with defense secondary exposure.
notes: Ambiguous case — FAA isn't quite in our vocabulary; mostly trade + defense.

thesis_summary: Gold ETF: hedge against dollar debasement, fiscal deficits, geopolitical risk.
evidence: Central bank buying at multi-decade highs
notes: Macro hedge — every macro tag legitimately applies.

thesis_summary: Long-duration Treasury ETF: thesis is rate cuts ahead + duration positioning.
Microsoft: Azure AI workload growth + Copilot monetization across O365.
notes: antitrust appropriate due to Activision precedent + ongoing scrutiny.

thesis_summary: Welltower: senior housing REIT; demographic tailwind from aging boomers, occupancy recovery post-pandemic.
evidence: NOI growth >20% YoY in SH operating segment
notes: Healthcare REITs are an interesting ambiguous case — Medicare/Medicaid reimbursement rules touch the SNF segment, even if not the SH segment. We include healthcare_policy because of the SNF exposure. Immigration is real (CNA labor shortage).

thesis_summary: Amazon: AWS recovery + retail margin expansion + advertising scale. FTC antitrust case + labor unionization are the policy overhangs.
notes: ai_capex via AWS Trainium / Anthropic partnership.

thesis_summary: Rivian: EV truck/SUV ramp + VW JV cash infusion; profitability path requires R2 launch + cost reduction.
notes: Same EV-policy stack as TSLA, smaller scale.

thesis_summary: Vertex: cystic fibrosis monopoly + non-opioid pain franchise launch with suzetrigine.
notes: drug_pricing — high-cost rare-disease franchises sit squarely in IRA negotiation crosshairs medium-term.

thesis_summary: Caterpillar: construction + infrastructure cycle; thesis depends on continued IIJA spending + reshoring construction demand.
notes: Reshoring tag fits — construction equipment demand correlates with new US factory builds.

thesis_summary: Delta: corporate travel recovery + premium cabin mix + capacity discipline; rates / fuel are the main macro overhangs.
notes: Labor policy real (pilot contracts + DOT regulation); jet fuel sensitivity makes energy_policy relevant. Could argue immigration_policy for visa-dependent travel, but stretch.

thesis_summary: Home Depot: housing turnover bottom + pro-customer expansion; thesis sensitive to mortgage rates and housing starts.
evidence: Existing home sales at multi-decade low
Pro segment growing faster than DIY
notes: Tariffs because a lot of building product is imported.

thesis_summary: Goldman: IB recovery + asset management scale + capital markets normalization.
notes: Basel III + capital rules central to ROE expectations.

thesis_summary: Palantir: government + commercial AIP traction; defense + intelligence backlog growing, commercial pipeline expanding.
notes: Both defense and AI exposure relevant.

thesis_summary: Unity: gaming engine + ads recovery post-pricing reset; turnaround thesis with execution risk, mostly idiosyncratic.
notes: Deliberate empty-tag case — primarily a company-specific execution story, no obvious regime variable dominates. Tests that the classifier is comfortable returning [] when nothing fits.

thesis_summary: Disney: parks + DTC profitability inflection + ESPN OTT launch.
notes: Theme park labor and visitor visas are real but small. Antitrust covers DTC bundling + sports rights scrutiny. Plausible empty too.

thesis_summary: Ford: ICE truck cash cow + EV losses narrowing + Pro fleet business growing.
notes: USMCA exposure (assembly in MX), UAW contracts, EV credits all in play.

thesis_summary: Pfizer: post-COVID baseline reset complete; oncology pipeline (Seagen integration) is the medium-term growth story.
notes: Antitrust appropriate for large pharma M&A scrutiny.

thesis_summary: Schlumberger: international + offshore oil-service cycle, less US-shale exposed than peers.
notes: Sanctions relevant due to Russia exposure history.

thesis_summary: CrowdStrike: cyber consolidation + module expansion; post-outage retention metrics holding up.
notes: Mostly idiosyncratic; defense_spending is the closest regime hook. Borderline empty too.

thesis_summary: Long US equities broadly: thesis is soft landing + earnings growth, leadership broadening beyond mega-cap tech.
notes: Index-level thesis — anything macro qualifies. Capped at 5.

thesis_summary: Uranium ETF: AI data-center power demand + global nuclear restart + supply-constrained yellow-cake market.
notes: Strong fit on energy + AI-capex; permitting matters for SMR timeline.

thesis_summary: Moderna: post-COVID revenue cliff + mRNA platform optionality (oncology, flu, RSV).
MP Materials: rare-earth mine + magnet plant; thesis depends on continued domestic-sourcing policy + China export-control retaliation.
notes: All five tags fit; the 5-tag cap kicks in. Tests the classifier respects MAX_PREMISE_TAGS=5.

thesis_summary: Deere: ag-equipment replacement cycle + precision-ag software monetisation. Tariffs on imported components and farm policy are the operative risks.
notes: Farm-bill exposure makes fiscal_spending fit; steel/aluminum tariffs on components fit tariffs.universal.

thesis_summary: Freeport-McMoRan: copper supply tightness from electrification + grid spend; Indonesia smelter ramp resolves export-licence overhang.
notes: Energy transition demand + Indonesia geopolitics + Russia copper sanctions exposure.

thesis_summary: Intel: foundry pivot + 18A node yield + CHIPS Act funding underwrite. Thesis hinges on government support and US fab build-out.
notes: Core CHIPS Act case — 5-tag cap. Strong fit on every tag.

thesis_summary: Alphabet: Search ads resilience + Cloud + Waymo optionality. DOJ antitrust remedies and EU AI Act are the operative policy risks.
notes: Three operative tags. Antitrust is the binary, ai_policy covers EU + state-level AI rules.

thesis_summary: Bank of America: deposit-franchise + scale advantages; thesis depends on capital rule outcomes and a soft landing for credit losses.
Micron: memory cycle inflection + HBM3E share for AI accelerators; supply discipline industry-wide.
notes: Memory benefits from AI capex + China is biggest end market exposed to export controls.

thesis_summary: ASML: EUV monopoly underwrites multi-year orders; thesis depends on continued shipments to non-China leading-edge fabs.
evidence: China revenue mix declining as expected
notes: Export controls explicitly carve ASML out of China advanced node market.

thesis_summary: Enphase: US residential solar microinverter demand recovery; thesis is rate-sensitive (financing) and IRA-credit dependent.
notes: 5-tag legitimate stack — credits + financing rates + solar policy + module tariffs.

thesis_summary: Chevron: integrated oil major with cash-return discipline; thesis is structurally underspending capex and returning >100% FCF.
notes: Sanctions because Venezuela license + Russia history. Permitting matters for US shale.

thesis_summary: Peabody Energy: thermal-coal cash cow with structural demand from EM electrification + AI-driven baseload needs.
evidence: US power grid stress events rising
notes: Coal benefits from deglobalization (energy security) and AI baseload need. Sparse-tag coverage for deglobalization.

thesis_summary: AMD: data-center AI accelerator share gains via MI300 + MI325; thesis depends on hyperscaler AI capex sustaining.
notes: Mirror of NVDA thesis with different specifics.

thesis_summary: BlackRock: asset-management scale + ETF dominance; private-credit franchise growth via GIP acquisition.
notes: Antitrust due to scale concerns + DOL fiduciary rule angle.

thesis_summary: Occidental Petroleum: Permian operator with low-carbon optionality (DAC). Thesis is oil price + 45Q carbon-credit policy.
Marsh McLennan: insurance brokerage scale + risk-management consulting growth. Mostly idiosyncratic.
notes: Deliberate empty-tag case — idiosyncratic services thesis, no obvious regime hook.

thesis_summary: Vistra: power producer benefitting from data-center load growth and Texas grid tightness.
US Steel: domestic steel producer; thesis depends on Section 232 tariff continuation and reshoring driving demand for US-flat-rolled. Nippon Steel merger pending CFIUS review.
notes: Tag-near-miss case — relies on tariffs.china competitive pressure but never mentions China by name. Tests whether classifier picks the right specificity (tariffs.sectoral, not tariffs.china).

thesis_summary: ONEOK: natgas midstream — pipeline + processing. Thesis is permitting acceleration enabling Permian gas takeaway buildout.
notes: Permitting + EO covers Biden/Trump pipeline approvals (sparse-tag coverage for executive_order).

thesis_summary: GE Vernova: gas-turbine backlog driven by data-center load + electrification; nuclear SMR + wind/renewables grid optionality.
EOG Resources: shale-oil producer with reserves quality + capital-return discipline. Thesis: capital-light cycle, not a growth story.
General Dynamics: combat-systems + Gulfstream + IT services. Defense-budget tailwind and aircraft-cycle inflection.
RTX: commercial aero (Pratt) recovery + Raytheon defense; international missile-defense backlog.
First Solar: domestic-content tax credits underwriting US module mfg; thesis depends on 45X / 48E credit continuation + Chinese-import tariffs.
evidence: AD/CVD on Southeast Asia modules in effect

thesis_summary: P&G: pricing power + portfolio resilience; consumer staples with modest FX exposure.
notes: Mostly idiosyncratic; FX + universal-tariff are the only operative regime hooks.

thesis_summary: Coca-Cola: global beverage franchise with EM volume growth; FX-translation is the operative macro risk.
Nike: brand turnaround + China demand recovery + DTC profitability; thesis sensitive to Vietnam/China sourcing and EU consumer.
Costco: membership-fee model + private label scale; mostly idiosyncratic, modest sensitivity to imports.
McDonald's: franchise-system stability + value reset driving traffic recovery; thesis mostly idiosyncratic.
notes: Labor real (state-min-wage); FX for international royalties.

thesis_summary: Starbucks: turnaround under new CEO + China optionality. Mostly execution-driven thesis.
HCA Healthcare: hospital operator with cost-leverage and Medicare-Advantage tailwinds; thesis sensitive to Medicaid eligibility and 340B reform.
notes: Hospitals: Medicaid + drug-pricing + nurse-labor + foreign-trained physicians.

thesis_summary: UnitedHealth: scale-driven cost advantage + Optum integration; Medicare-Advantage rate notice and PBM legislation are the main risks.
T-Mobile: spectrum advantage + fixed-wireless access growth; mostly idiosyncratic but spectrum policy matters.
Verizon: dividend + deleveraging story; thesis is rate-sensitive and competitive intensity in wireless.
notes: Rates because dividend yield is yield-comp.

thesis_summary: AT&T: deleveraging + fiber growth; thesis sensitive to rate trajectory and broadband competition.
Chipotle: throughput optimization + new units; thesis mostly idiosyncratic but labor + immigration policy real.
Phillips 66: refining margins recovery + capital return; thesis is RFS/RFS2 dependent and crack spreads.
notes: Renewable diesel credits stack into clean-energy-credits + tax-policy.

thesis_summary: Valero: refining + renewable-diesel scale; thesis depends on SAF/biofuel credits and refining margins.
J&J: pharma + medtech post-Kenvue spin; thesis depends on Stelara biosimilar erosion path and IRA negotiation outcomes.
AbbVie: post-Humira diversification; Skyrizi/Rinvoq franchise + ImmunoGen ADC platform.
evidence: Skyrizi tracking ahead of peak Humira

thesis_summary: Merck: Keytruda dominance + post-LOE pipeline (Daiichi ADCs, oral PCSK9); thesis dominated by Keytruda LOE in 2028.
Bristol-Myers: post-Eliquis LOE + Karuna acquisition; thesis hinges on Cobenfy launch and oncology pipeline depth.
Netflix: subscriber growth re-acceleration + ad-tier monetisation + live-sports optionality. Mostly idiosyncratic.
Oracle: OCI growth + AI workload migration; thesis depends on hyperscaler-comparable AI capex sustaining.
Salesforce: margin discipline + Agentforce AI monetisation. Thesis is execution-driven.
Adobe: Firefly/Sensei AI integration + subscription resilience. Thesis idiosyncratic with regulatory risk on AI training data.
notes: Antitrust because Figma deal blocked + ongoing scrutiny.

thesis_summary: PayPal: transaction monetisation + Venmo turnaround; idiosyncratic execution story.
Visa: network economics + cross-border travel recovery; thesis sensitive to merchant-fee regulation and antitrust.
Mastercard: same as Visa thesis but with stronger international mix.
Block: Cash App monetisation + crypto/BTC strategy + Square seller. Thesis sensitive to crypto-regulation outcomes.
MicroStrategy: BTC-treasury proxy. Thesis is bitcoin price + reflexive equity premium to NAV.
Riot Platforms: BTC miner with low-cost power and HPC pivot optionality.
Digital Realty: data-center REIT benefitting from AI/cloud demand. Power availability is the binding constraint.
Equinix: interconnection-platform monopoly; AI workload colocation demand growing.
American Tower: cell-tower REIT; thesis sensitive to rates (yield comp) and India divestiture proceeds.
Simon Property: mall REIT with luxury/outlet tilt; thesis idiosyncratic with rate sensitivity.
Realty Income: net-lease REIT; pure rate trade with steady dividend growth.
evidence: Cap-rate gap to bond yields normalising

thesis_summary: VICI Properties: gaming-real-estate REIT with experiential tilt; idiosyncratic + rates.
Prologis: industrial logistics REIT; thesis depends on reshoring + e-commerce demand, with rate sensitivity.
notes: Industrial REIT — reshoring matters for warehouse demand.

thesis_summary: Equitable Holdings: variable annuity + asset-management; thesis is rate-sensitive with regulatory risk on annuity rules.
Citigroup: turnaround under Fraser; thesis is execution + capital return + rate sensitivity.
Wells Fargo: asset cap removal catalyst + NII upside on cap relief; capital ratios strong.
notes: Asset cap is a Fed action.

thesis_summary: Blackstone: alternatives scale + private-credit secular; thesis sensitive to rates and asset-manager regulation.
KKR: alternatives + insurance (Global Atlantic); thesis on alt-share-gain + rate normalisation.
Apollo Global Management: private credit + Athene insurance integration. Thesis is private-credit dominance.
Ares Management: private-credit specialist; thesis on direct-lending share + private wealth growth.
United Rentals: equipment-rental scale; thesis depends on non-res construction cycle + IIJA / CHIPS / IRA spending.
Martin Marietta: aggregates pricing power + IIJA-funded highway spend; thesis is fiscal-cycle dependent.
Vulcan Materials: same playbook as MLM; aggregates + IIJA.
UPS: domestic small-package + healthcare logistics + Teamsters contract resolved. Thesis is volume recovery + margin discipline.
FedEx: cost-takeout via Network 2.0 + Air-Ground integration; thesis margin-recovery story.
Union Pacific: rail volume recovery + service improvements; thesis cyclical + capital-return.
CSX: Eastern rail with service-led growth; thesis cyclical + idiosyncratic.
GE Aerospace: aftermarket dominance + LEAP shop visits ramping. Thesis is commercial-aero cycle.
Honeywell: diversified industrial + Aerospace recovery. Thesis idiosyncratic.
Trane Technologies: HVAC tailwind from data-center cooling + commercial decarbonisation.
Carrier Global: HVAC + electrification beneficiary; portfolio simplification underway.
Johnson Controls: building-controls + HVAC; thesis depends on commercial-construction cycle.
Nucor: domestic steel with Section 232 protection + mini-mill efficiency; thesis depends on continued protection + non-res construction.
Steel Dynamics: same stack as NUE plus aluminum-flat-rolled startup.
Baker Hughes: gas-turbine + LNG-services franchise benefitting from data-center power + LNG cycle.
Halliburton: pressure-pumping consolidation + international growth; thesis on capital discipline.
Devon Energy: Permian + Eagle Ford operator with variable dividend; thesis oil-price dependent.
Marathon Oil: pure-play E&P with Bahamas/EG exposure; ConocoPhillips acquisition pending.
Walgreens: turnaround under Wentworth; closing 1,200 stores + healthcare reset. Highly idiosyncratic.
CVS Health: integrated payer-PBM-pharmacy; thesis depends on Aetna MA + PBM reform outcome.
Elevance Health: BCBS plans + Carelon services; thesis dependent on MA rate outlook + Medicaid eligibility.
Intuitive Surgical: da Vinci installed base + da Vinci 5 cycle; thesis idiosyncratic.
Regeneron: Eylea LOE concerns offset by Dupixent + oncology pipeline.
Gilead: HIV franchise + lenacapavir long-acting; oncology pipeline depth growing.
Amgen: oncology + obesity (MariTide) optionality; thesis depends on Repatha LOE management + GLP-1 entry.
Biogen: Leqembi launch + post-Aduhelm reset; thesis depends on Medicare coverage and prescribing uptake.
Novavax: COVID-vaccine residual + Sanofi partnership economics; thesis mostly idiosyncratic.
Occidental Petroleum #2: same as 048 but tested via different focus — heavy on DAC and 45Q.
notes: Re-using OXY symbol intentionally to test classifier consistency under different framings. Subset of 048's tags.

thesis_summary: S&P Global: ratings + indices + Visible Alpha data scale. Mostly idiosyncratic, mild rate sensitivity for issuance.
Moody's: ratings + analytics + ESG; thesis depends on issuance cycle and regulatory framework for ratings.
Intercontinental Exchange: mortgage-tech (Black Knight) integration + energy-trading franchise. Thesis idiosyncratic.
CME Group: rate-vol + commodity-futures franchise; thesis on continued macro vol and crypto-product growth.
Charles Schwab: NII recovery as cash sorting normalises + asset gathering; thesis hinges on rate cuts and deposit stickiness.
Zoom: post-pandemic reset complete; AI features (AI Companion) + Contact Center growth. Mostly idiosyncratic.
Shopify: take-rate + Shop Pay + international expansion; thesis idiosyncratic with macro consumer sensitivity.
Etsy: discretionary-marketplace turnaround; thesis depends on US consumer + Chinese-marketplace competition.
Alibaba: China-internet recovery + cloud + international commerce. Multi-tag regime stack.
JD.com: Chinese e-commerce + logistics scale; thesis depends on China consumer + US-listed-ADR regulatory framework.
PDD Holdings: Temu international expansion + Pinduoduo domestic resilience; thesis sensitive to de-minimis tariff reform.
evidence: Temu growth high but margins pressuring

thesis_summary: Tencent: gaming + payments + cloud; idiosyncratic with regulatory overhang.
Sea Limited: Shopee SEA dominance + Garena recovery + SeaMoney scale. Thesis is execution + regulatory.
evidence: Garena Free Fire returning to India

thesis_summary: MercadoLibre: LatAm e-comm + fintech scale; thesis idiosyncratic with FX and Argentina macro.
BHP: copper + iron-ore + potash; thesis depends on China steel demand + electrification copper.
Rio Tinto: iron ore + Mongolian copper (OT) ramping; thesis on China steel + copper.
Albemarle: lithium prices recovery + project optionality; thesis depends on EV demand + China lithium supply.
Newmont: gold-mining major; thesis is gold price + reserve quality + Newcrest synergies.
Williams Companies: gas-pipeline footprint + LNG corridor exposure; thesis hinges on permitting + LNG-export approvals.
notes: EO covers DOE LNG-export pause/lift. Sparse-tag coverage for executive_order.

thesis_summary: Energy Transfer: midstream MLP with NGL export franchise; thesis sensitive to permitting + LNG cycle.
Marathon Petroleum: refining + midstream (MPLX); thesis on refining cycle + renewable diesel.
EQT Corporation: Appalachian natgas pure-play; thesis depends on LNG-export demand + take-away capacity.
Lennar: homebuilder scale + land-light strategy; thesis depends on mortgage rates + housing under-supply.
D.R. Horton: same playbook as LEN with stronger entry-level exposure.
PulteGroup: balanced homebuilder; thesis on rate-sensitive demand + supply discipline.
Toll Brothers: luxury homebuilder with affluent buyer + cash-buyer mix; less rate-sensitive than peers.
Zillow: housing-transaction platform + 'Super App' bundle; thesis depends on housing turnover bottom.
RH (Restoration Hardware): luxury home furnishings; thesis cyclical with housing turnover.
Burlington Stores: off-price retail with sourcing leverage; thesis idiosyncratic.
Dollar General: low-income consumer turnaround; thesis depends on SNAP benefits + min-wage policy.
Dollar Tree: $1.25 price-point + Family Dollar drag; thesis depends on consumer + tariff cost.
AutoZone: auto-parts retail + commercial growth; thesis on vehicle-age tailwind. Mostly idiosyncratic.
O'Reilly Automotive: DIFM + DIY model with margin discipline. Mostly idiosyncratic.
Advance Auto Parts: turnaround with new CEO; restructuring story.
notes: Empty case — pure execution turnaround. Tag-near-miss for tariffs but not load-bearing.

thesis_summary: Altria: tobacco-cash-cow + nicotine optionality + Cronos / NJOY positioning. Thesis is regulatory.
notes: FDA enforcement actions = EO/regulatory. Sparse-tag coverage.

thesis_summary: Philip Morris: international tobacco + ZYN nicotine-pouch growth; thesis on regulatory framework for next-gen.
Anheuser-Busch InBev: global brewer with EM tailwind + Bud Light reputational damage receding; thesis is volume recovery.
Estée Lauder: China duty-free recovery + brand portfolio + travel-retail normalisation. Thesis hinges on China demand.
Target: traffic recovery + margin restoration; thesis depends on consumer + sourcing.
Lowe's: home-improvement with pro-mix lag vs HD; thesis depends on housing turnover.
Baidu: search + Apollo robotaxi optionality + Ernie LLM; thesis depends on China consumer + AI competition.
Twilio: communications platform turnaround under new CEO + AI/Segment expansion. Idiosyncratic.
Okta: identity platform with post-breach customer-retention focus; thesis idiosyncratic.
ServiceNow: workflow platform + GenAI (Now Assist) monetisation; thesis on enterprise AI adoption.
Datadog: observability + AI-workload monitoring; thesis idiosyncratic with cloud-spend cycle.
Snowflake: data-cloud + Cortex AI; thesis on data-platform consolidation + AI workload migration.
MongoDB: developer-data-platform + Atlas growth; AI use-cases driving consumption.
Palo Alto Networks: platformisation + Cortex Xsiam migration; thesis is cyber consolidation.
Zscaler: SASE leader with federal momentum; thesis idiosyncratic + federal-spend.
SentinelOne: EDR alternative to CrowdStrike + Microsoft; thesis on competitive position post-CRWD outage.
Atlassian: cloud migration + enterprise + Rovo AI; thesis on cloud adoption + Loom integration.
Intuit: TurboTax + QuickBooks platform + AI Assist + Credit Karma; thesis idiosyncratic with mild tax-policy exposure.
ADP: payroll-services scale + workforce-now platform. Mostly idiosyncratic with mild rate sensitivity (client funds).
Paycom: HCM platform + Beti AI; thesis idiosyncratic.
DoorDash: marketplace consolidation + ad-monetisation + grocery growth. Thesis idiosyncratic with gig-worker classification risk.
Uber: rideshare-AV partnerships + delivery profitability + autonomous optionality.
Lyft: profitability turnaround + driver-incentive optimisation; thesis idiosyncratic.
Airbnb: short-term-rental dominance + experiences relaunch; thesis depends on cross-border travel and STR regulation.
Booking Holdings: travel-OTA scale + AI agent integration; thesis idiosyncratic with FX.
Expedia: B2B + Vrbo strategy + corporate-travel platform; thesis idiosyncratic.
Carnival: cruise-demand normalisation + balance-sheet deleveraging; thesis on rate environment + fuel.
Royal Caribbean: premium + Icon-class launch; thesis on cruise pricing power + balance-sheet recovery.
Marriott: hotel-room growth + fee-stream resilience; thesis idiosyncratic with international exposure.
Hilton: similar to MAR; asset-light + fee streams. Thesis idiosyncratic.
Berkshire (B): conglomerate breadth + Apple stake + insurance float. Thesis mostly idiosyncratic.
notes: Conglomerate — no obvious regime hook dominates. Tag-near-miss for rates (insurance float) but not load-bearing.

thesis_summary: Duolingo: subscription growth + Max tier + AI features; idiosyncratic execution story.
Roku: streaming-platform ad recovery + international monetisation; thesis idiosyncratic.
Pinterest: ad-relevancy + Amazon ads partnership; thesis idiosyncratic.
Snap: ad-platform recovery + Spectacles AR optionality; thesis idiosyncratic + KOSA exposure.
Spotify: pricing power + podcast monetisation + audiobook tier; thesis on ARPU growth.
DraftKings: sports-betting state legalisation + handle growth; thesis on regulatory access.
Penn Entertainment: ESPN Bet relaunch + casino footprint; thesis idiosyncratic.
Wynn Resorts: Macau recovery + Vegas premium-mass mix + Marjan project optionality. Thesis depends on Macau visitation policy.
Las Vegas Sands: pure-play Macau + Singapore; thesis on Macau visitation + concession terms.
MGM Resorts: Vegas-heavy + BetMGM optionality + Empire City NY casino bid.
GameStop: cash-pile + retail-meme exposure; thesis idiosyncratic, mostly non-fundamental.
BlackBerry: QNX automotive + cybersecurity divisions split; thesis idiosyncratic.
US Concrete: ready-mix concrete with reshoring + IIJA tailwinds. Thesis sensitive to cement-import tariffs and shutdown risk for fiscal flows.
notes: Sparse-tag coverage for shutdown (fiscal flow risk if Congress lapses).

thesis_summary: Science Applications: federal IT contractor; thesis depends on FY26 appropriations and continuing-resolution risk.
notes: Government shutdown is a real cash-flow risk for fed contractors.

thesis_summary: Leidos: federal-IT + defense modernization; thesis on CR/shutdown risk + DOD pipeline.
GoDaddy: domains + commerce + AI Airo; thesis idiosyncratic.
IBM: hybrid-cloud (Red Hat) + watsonx AI + consulting; thesis on enterprise AI commercialisation.
Cisco: networking + Splunk integration + AI infrastructure ordering; thesis idiosyncratic.
Arista: AI datacenter networking; thesis depends on AI capex + Cisco competitive dynamics.
Broadcom: AI custom-silicon (Google + Meta TPUs) + VMware integration; thesis on hyperscaler ASIC capex.
Marvell: AI optical + custom silicon; thesis on hyperscaler programs.
Lam Research: WFE leader for memory + leading-edge logic; thesis tracks WFE cycle and China revenue mix.
Applied Materials: WFE breadth + leading-edge logic + memory; thesis cyclical.
KLA Corp: process-control monopoly in semis; thesis cyclical with high incremental margins.
ON Semiconductor: silicon-carbide for EVs + industrial; thesis on EV adoption + EU/China tariffs.
Wolfspeed: silicon carbide pure-play; thesis depends on CHIPS Act funding + EV ramp execution.
Qualcomm: handset modem + Snapdragon X compute + automotive; thesis on AI PC + China handset exposure.
Arm Holdings: royalty model + AI compute + data-center adoption; thesis on royalty rate + market share.
Long Treasuries #2: thesis depends on debt-ceiling resolution not forcing extraordinary T-bill issuance; if shutdown extends, supply dynamics shift.
notes: Treasury supply dynamics tied to debt-ceiling + shutdown.

thesis_summary: 7-10y Treasury ETF: thesis on rate-cut path + debt-ceiling dynamics.
Short Treasury Bills ETF: thesis depends on T-bill supply dynamics through debt-ceiling and TGA rebuild.
TIPS ETF: thesis on inflation persistence + supply dynamics through debt-ceiling resolutions.
Dollar Index: thesis on dollar weakness from BRICS reserve diversification + deglobalization narrative.
Dollar bullish ETF: thesis depends on rate differentials + deglobalization not materially eroding dollar reserve status.
Avis Budget: car-rental cycle + deglobalization (less travel reliance on imports). Mostly idiosyncratic.
Linde: industrial-gases scale + clean-hydrogen/CCS optionality. Thesis on industrial cycle + deglobalization-driven reshoring.
notes: Deglobalization fits — bifurcating supply chains favour US industrial gases.

thesis_summary: Jabil: contract manufacturer with deglobalization tailwinds + Apple wind-down headwind; thesis on automotive + healthcare diversification.
Aerospace & Defense ETF: thesis on sustained geopolitical risk + executive-order spending floors.
Disruptive-innovation ETF: high-beta to rate-cut path + AI policy + executive-order tone.
Financials ETF: thesis on banking-deregulation EOs + capital-rule outcomes + rate-cut path.
JinkoSolar: Chinese solar-module manufacturer; thesis depends on EU + US tariff outcomes and AD/CVD rulings.

thesis_summary: STMicroelectronics: EU + Italian semiconductor with auto exposure; thesis on EU industrial + China auto demand.
ASM International: WFE supplier with EU exposure + China revenue mix risk.
evidence: China revenue running at policy limit

thesis_summary: Germany ETF: thesis depends on EU stimulus + tariff outcomes + China auto export demand.
France ETF: thesis on EU industrial + nuclear-renaissance + China luxury demand.
General Motors: ICE truck cash cow + EV ramp + Cruise wind-down; thesis depends on USMCA + EV credits + China.
Stellantis: Jeep / Ram cycle + EV transition; thesis on US tariff structure + Mexico plants + EU CO2 fines.
Mexico ETF: thesis depends on nearshoring tailwind + USMCA re-opener risk.
Fluor: EPC contractor with nuclear + LNG + chip-fab backlog; thesis on capex super-cycle. Sensitive to government shutdown for DOE awards.
Quanta Services: electric-utility EPC + transmission build-out; thesis depends on permitting acceleration + fiscal flow.
PACCAR: Class 8 truck manufacturer; thesis on freight cycle + EPA/NHTSA emission rules + tariffs.
Texas Instruments: analog cycle + Sherman 300mm fabs + CHIPS Act funding. Thesis on industrial recovery.
FuelCell Energy: stationary-fuel-cell maker; thesis depends on 45V hydrogen-credit guidance and DOE LPO support.
TMC the Metals Company: deep-sea mining permit pursuit; thesis depends on ISA + NOAA permitting and executive-order signals.
Ross Stores: off-price retail leverage; thesis idiosyncratic with sourcing exposure to Mexico + China.
Powell Industries: electrical-equipment for power-distribution; thesis on data-center + LNG + utility capex.
GitLab: DevSecOps platform + Duo AI; thesis idiosyncratic.
Nasdaq-100 ETF: thesis on continued tech leadership + AI capex + rate-cut path. Multiple regime hooks.
Russell 2000 ETF: small-cap thesis on rate cuts + domestic-revenue tilt insulating from tariffs.
EAFE Developed-International ETF: thesis on EU stimulus + Japan corporate reform + FX.
EM ETF: thesis on dollar weakness + China stabilisation + Fed cuts; sensitive to sanctions framework.
Russia-exposure analogue (after RSX delisting): thesis-as-cautionary case for sanctions-frozen positions.
notes: Sanctions explicit coverage — historical lesson fixture.

thesis_summary: South Africa ETF: thesis on commodity exports + sanctions framework + energy crisis recovery.
Cameco: uranium-mining major; thesis depends on global nuclear restart + Russia/Kazakhstan supply sanctions risk.
Constellation Energy: nuclear fleet + data-center PPAs; thesis on continued PTC + capacity prices.
NRG Energy: retail + generation; thesis depends on ERCOT capacity-market reform.
Talen Energy: nuclear + gas-fired generation; thesis on data-center PPAs + ERCOT/PJM capacity markets.
notes: Nuclear + EO on AWS-PPA review (FERC-style EO/regulatory action). Tests classifier on a less-obvious executive_order trigger.

thesis_summary: Veralto: water-quality / product-ID instruments; thesis idiosyncratic.
Cintas: uniform-services scale; thesis cyclical with employment + idiosyncratic. Mostly empty.
Waste Management: integrated waste services + recycling + RNG optionality; thesis idiosyncratic with RNG tax credits.
Republic Services: waste services with US Ecology specialty franchise; thesis idiosyncratic.
Ameriprise Financial: wealth + asset-management scale; thesis idiosyncratic with rate sensitivity.
T. Rowe Price: active-management franchise; thesis on active-equity flows + 401k secular.
State Street: custody + Charles River + asset-management; thesis on rate cuts + fee-income.
BNY Mellon: custody + clearing + treasury services; thesis on rate normalisation + market-vol.
Government-shutdown beneficiary scenario: securities-clearing thesis depends on Treasury auction continuity — shutdown disrupts settlement. Cautionary thesis.
Federal IT services analogue (RTI Industries proxy): thesis on continuing-resolution fatigue + DOD modernization spend.
Reconciliation-bill beneficiary: thesis on continued fiscal flow through reconciliation packages plus SCOTUS-ruling-dependent program survival.
Tax-deferred mortgage REIT proxy: thesis on SCOTUS ruling re Constitutional limits on FHA / Fannie/Freddie reform.
GEO Group: private-prison + immigration-detention; thesis depends on immigration policy + contract renewals + SCOTUS rulings on detention.
CoreCivic: private-corrections + detention; thesis same as GEO — depends on policy + SCOTUS rulings.
Arch Capital: specialty insurance + mortgage insurance; thesis idiosyncratic with SCOTUS ruling exposure on PMIERs / mortgage rules.
AGNC Investment: agency mortgage REIT; thesis depends on rate stability + SCOTUS-ruling-dependent GSE-reform path.
Annaly Capital: agency mortgage REIT; thesis on rate-cut path + SCOTUS-dependent housing finance.
Restaurant Brands International: Burger King + Tim Hortons + Popeyes; thesis idiosyncratic with FX + labor.
Brazil ETF: thesis on commodity exports + central-bank credibility + fiscal anchor; FX-volatile.
South Korea ETF: thesis on memory cycle + China exposure + Yoon-government-driven reforms.
Taiwan ETF: thesis on TSMC dominance + China invasion tail risk.
China large-cap ETF: thesis on stimulus + property stabilisation + ADR-listing regulatory path.
KraneShares China Internet ETF: thesis on PRC platform stabilisation + ADR regulatory path.
Japan ETF: thesis on Japan corporate-reform + BoJ normalization + capital-return cycle.
Australia ETF: thesis on commodity exports + RBA path; FX-sensitive.
India ETF: thesis on Modi industrial policy + demographics + capex cycle.
Emerging Markets ETF: thesis on dollar weakness + Fed cuts + China stabilisation; ex-Korea now includes Saudi.
Eurozone ETF: thesis on ECB cuts + tariff resolution + China auto demand.
UK ETF: thesis on Bank of England + financials weighting + FTSE 100 commodity exposure.
Inflation hedge via TIPS plus commodity overlay: thesis is regime-shift to higher inflation, with tariff pass-through cementing pricing.
iShares Min-Vol US: thesis on defensive equity tilt; idiosyncratic to factor performance.
notes: Empty — factor ETF, no regime hook.
